strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong engineering practices background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume or projects
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java experience is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Cloud exposure appears AWS-only; no mention of GCP, Azure, or Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective deployment

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of full-stack engineering experience with strong alignment to the TypeScript/Node.js/React core stack, recent hands-on work on AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and a demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship through TDD, CI/CD, and community teaching. Gaps exist around Nest.js specifically and current Kotlin/Java proficiency, and cloud/container experience leans toward AWS rather than the broader GCP/Azure/Kubernetes set, but the overall trajectory and breadth strongly match a mid-senior fullstack role focused on internal automation tooling.
